Can we form a \"good\" subsequence of exactly `len` characters from `s`?\n// A good string has strictly more than half its characters equal to 'a'.\n// We choose numA of the available 'a's and (len - numA) of the available non-'a's,\n// such that 2 * numA > len (the \"good\" condition).\nghost predicate CanFormGoodOfLength(s: string, len: int)\n{\n  0 <= len <= |s| &&\n  exists numA: int | 0 <= numA <= len ::\n    numA <= CountA(s) &&\n    len - numA + CountA(s) <= |s| &&\n    2 * numA > len\n}\n\nlemma CountABound(s: string)\n  ensures CountA(s) <= |s|\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| > 0 {\n    CountABound(s[..|s|-1]);\n  }\n}\n\nmethod LoveA(s: string) returns (result: int)\n  requires CountA(s) >= 1\n  ensures 0 <= result <= |s|\n  ensures CanFormGoodOfLength(s, result)\n  ensures forall k | result < k <= |s| :: !CanFormGoodOfLength(s, k)\n{\n  CountABound(s);\n\n  var count := 0;\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < |s|\n    invariant 0 <= i <= |s|\n    invariant count == CountA(s[..i])\n count - 1;\n  if |s| < candidate {\n    result := |s|;\n    // Witness for CanFormGoodOfLength: numA = count\n    assert 0 <= count <= |s|;\n    assert count <= CountA(s);\n    assert |s| - count + CountA(s) <= |s|;\n    assert 2 * count > |s|;\n    // Maximality: range result < k <= |s| is empty since result == |s|\n  } else {\n    result := candidate;\n    // Witness for CanFormGoodOfLength: numA = count\n    assert 0 <= count <= candidate;\n    assert count <= CountA(s);\n    assert candidate - count + CountA(s) <= |s|;\n    assert 2 * count > candidate;\n\n    // Prove maximality: for k > 2*count-1, any numA with 2*numA > k\n    // requires numA > count = CountA(s), contradicting numA <= CountA(s)\n    forall k | candidate < k <= |s|\n      ensures !CanFormGoodOfLength(s, k)\n    {\n }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":9742,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":9742},"output_tokens":11,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"e7ac80df-05aa-42ec-9200-2a7cfcc87afd","uuid":"d0368757-f7c3-4404-a65d-8da62f927fce"},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773788400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"f4275a5c-11a5-4fe1-8a5f-287640ae8cbe","session_id":"e7ac80df-05aa-42ec-9200-2a7cfcc87afd"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DNzMVF4aJ1QPEncjxEqF44","type":"tool_result","content":"File
